zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzWarin於大約1316年出生在英國史洛普爾廷頓時，他的父親Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin37歲，母親Eleanor de Beauchamp40歲。他於大約1359年與Amicia Haddon在英國英格蘭多瑟特斯圖頓 考德爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國威爾斯波斯被列為governor of montgomery castle。他去世於大約1361年10月28日在英國波克夏望塔享年46歲，埋葬在英國波克夏望塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William FitzWarin于大约1316年出生在英国史洛普爾廷頓时，他的父亲Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin37岁，母亲Eleanor de Beauchamp40岁。他于大约1359年与Amicia Haddon在英国英格兰多瑟特斯圖頓 考德爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国威尔斯波斯被列为governor of montgomery castle。他去世于大约1361年10月28日在英国波克夏望塔享年46岁，埋葬在英国波克夏望塔。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzWarin was born about 1316, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, his father, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, was 37 and his mother, Eleanor de Beauchamp, was 40. He married Amicia Haddon about 1359, in Stourton Caundle, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as governor of montgomery castle in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom. He died about 28 October 1361, in Wantage, Berkshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Wantage, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William FitzWarin est né environ 1316, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Beauchamp, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Amicia Haddon environ 1359, à Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est governor of montgomery castle à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé environ 28 octobre 1361, à Wantage, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Wantage, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William FitzWarin um 1316 in Whittington, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin 37 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Beauchamp 40. Er hat um 1359 in Stourton Caundle, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Amicia Haddon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als governor of montgomery castle in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb um 28. Oktober 1361 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Wantage, Berkshire, England und wurde in Wantage, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzWarin è nato il circa 1316 nel Whittington, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Beauchamp, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Amicia Haddon circa 1359, nel Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come governor of montgomery castle nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito. Morì circa 28 ottobre 1361, nel Wantage, Berkshire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Wantage, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William FitzWarinが約1316年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarinは37歳，母Eleanor de Beauchampは40歳であった。約1359年にイギリスイギリスドールセトストウルトン カウンドルでAmicia Haddonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスウェールズポウイスでの職業はgovernor of montgomery castleと記録されている。彼は約1361年10月28日にイギリスバークシュアイアワンタッジで46歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアワンタッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William FitzWarin(이)가 대략 1316년 영국 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Beauchamp(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 스토우르턴 카운들일에서 Amicia Haddon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 governor of montgomery castle이었다. 그는 대략 1361년 10월 28일 영국 버크실르 완타지에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 완타지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzWarin nasceu aproximadamente 1316, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Beauchamp, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicia Haddon aproximadamente 1359, em Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como governor of montgomery castle em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 28 de outubro de 1361, em Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzWarin родился около 1316 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Beauchamp, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia Haddon около 1359 г. в местности стоуртон каундл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии governor of montgomery castle в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он умер около 28 октября 1361 г. в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William FitzWarin nació aproximadamente 1316, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Beauchamp, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Amicia Haddon aproximadamente 1359, en Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era governor of montgomery castle en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido. Murió aproximadamente 28 de octubre de 1361, en Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
